rawAssistant: Fresh signs on one side of the road, you say? Well, I've been around these roads long enough to know when something's amiss. Might be worth taking a closer look, if you ask me. We've had some... troubles with travelers lately. Soot and grime blowing in from the east wind's got everyone on edge. You'd best keep your cloak dry.
